hooks.command: echo '=== BIGCLAW SESSION START ===' && echo '--- Unprocessed specs ---' && find $HOME/Projects/bigclaw-ai/docs/specs -name '*.md' -not -path '*/done/*' -not -path '*/queue/*' 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '--- BOUNDARY: Never execute forge/ or axiom/ specs ---' && echo '--- PIPELINE: codeâ†’testâ†’reviewâ†’PRâ†’mergeâ†’deployâ†’verifyâ†’DONEâ†’next ---' && echo '==='
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && git add -A && git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: auto-commit on session stop'

echo 'â›” PIPELINE CHECK: Did you complete the FULL pipeline for every change? codeâ†’testâ†’reviewâ†’PRâ†’mergeâ†’deployâ†’verify liveâ†’DONE. If any step was skipped, fix it NOW before session ends.'

SESSION_FILE="$HOME/Projects/bigclaw-ai/knowledge/sessions/$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M)-bigclaw-site.md" && mkdir -p "$HOME/Projects/bigclaw-ai/knowledge/sessions" && echo "# Session Log â€” bigclaw-site â€” $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" > "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '## What was done' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git log --oneline --since='4 hours ago' 2>/dev/null | head -20 >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '## Files changed' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && git diff --stat HEAD~10 2>/dev/null | tail -5 >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '## Test results' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo 'TypeScript:' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -1 >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo '' >> "$SESSION_FILE" && echo "Session log: $SESSION_FILE"
